figures.caption: Validated ACS and PLACES depression attributes with standardized GEOID and selected covariates.
County-level table keyed by GEOID with depression prevalence and SES/covariate fields.
OLS coefficients for Depression prevalence with HC1 robust standard errors (county level).
Residuals versus fitted values from the county-level OLS model (visual check for heteroskedasticity/nonlinearity).
Q-Q plot of OLS residuals (visual check for departures from normality).
South Carolina county polygons enriched with depression prevalence and SES/demographic indicators for choropleth mapping.
County-level total visits and visitation composition shares by POI category.
OLS regression results with HC1 robust standard errors for mobility_PC1 and mobility_diversity as functions of SES and demographic covariates.
OLS mediator model coefficients with HC1 robust standard errors for mobility_PC1 regressed on SES and demographic covariates.
OLS outcome model coefficients with HC1 robust standard errors for county-level depression prevalence.
Bootstrap mediation effects (ACME, ADE, Total) of socioeconomic variables on depression prevalence via mobility_PC1, with percentile 95% confidence intervals.
Queen contiguity neighbor pairs between South Carolina counties with row-standardized weights by origin county.
Global Moran’s I test (with permutation p-value) for spatial autocorrelation in Depression_prev outcome-model residuals using aligned Queen contiguity weights.
Spatial error (SEM) regression results for Depression prevalence with aligned Queen contiguity weights (coefficients, lambda, standard errors, and fit statistics).
GWR model diagnostics and selected bandwidth for county-level Depression_prev regression.
Summary statistics describing spatial variability of GWR local coefficients (original units).
Choropleth map of b_Med_income coefficients across counties.
Choropleth map of b_percent_Poverty coefficients across counties.
Choropleth map of b_percent_Unemployed coefficients across counties.
Choropleth map of b_percent_Uninsured coefficients across counties.
Choropleth map of b_percent__HighSch coefficients across counties.
Choropleth map of b_mobility_PC1 coefficients across counties.
Choropleth map of b_percent__18 coefficients across counties.
Choropleth map of b_percent_Black coefficients across counties.
Choropleth map of b_percent_Hispanic coefficients across counties.
Choropleth map of gwr_localR2 coefficients across counties.
